market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P +0.09%, Nasdaq +0.28%, Dow -0.43%. Technology led sectors (+1.72%) while Materials lagged (-1.16%). Claude Sonnet 4.6 led the day at +0.01%. 3 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +8.66%. Key headline: China, Iran weaponized the global economy to beat the U.S. at its own game - The Washington Post — broadly positive for equities.
